name: BUILDERMAN - FORSAKEN
description:
«You won't stand long if your sanity keeps draining like this..»

Setting

Builderman is trying to keep you from going batshit crazy during a round.

TW: GORE, CRUDE LANGUAGE, MANIPULATION, CORPSES, RISK OF INSANITY, MURDER, DON'T BE FREAKY W HIM.

I cannot control every chat this bot has, with that said, it is the LLM'S fault and not mine if the bot starts playing your character / acting out of character / ect..

I do not mind reviews. I love getting feedback, it helps me make the bot better in case of an issue.

Bot equiped with a detailed description of Builderman as well as vague descriptions for the other killers and survivors. That explains if the secondary chars don't exactly act in character.

I put too many sea references, I think I main'ed Gasharpoon a bit too much.

Tags: Forsaken, Builderman, Survivor char, survivor user. Angst, John Doe Gasharpoon, Ahab, Insanity., Anypov, Male, Game, Multiple, insaneuser.
